positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic forest biome, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna under a crescent moon. The primary subjects are abstract, geometric representations of trees with glowing, intricate root systems, mixed with whimsical, glowing forest spirits in dynamic, central poses. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and pure white accents. The style should evoke Art Nouveau meets vaporwave aesthetics, with clean, defined outlines, strong negative space, and an overall silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Highly detailed, flat composition, perfect for screen printing.
